theme: asian night market with paper lanterns, wet cobblestones, amber light, crowded stalls

lantern_post_paper.usage: tall lantern pole repeated along the backline for warm ambient light

market_stall_wooden.usage: wide stall unit tiled across mid-background to form the market row

barrel_crate_stack.usage: low clutter prop between stalls, breakage flavor

hanging_sign_lantern.usage: hanging shop sign accent above stall entrances
